# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "your_project",
    "description": "Project description",
    "type": "project",
    "require": {
        "php": "^7.3"
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "wget https://example.com/asset1.txt -O asset1.txt",
            "wget https://example.com/asset2.zip -O asset2.zip",
            "unzip asset2.zip",
            "php compile_assets.php"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "wget https://example.com/updatedAsset1.txt -O updatedAsset1.txt",
            "wget https://example.com/updatedAsset2.zip -O updatedAsset2.zip",
            "unzip updatedAsset2.zip",
            "php compile_assets.php"
        ]
    }
}
